use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics and KPIs on dashboards
Showing portfolio or project statistics with linked actions
Presenting analytics data with descriptions and CTAs
Creating metric cards for SaaS product overviews
ai_summary: A modular stats card component with title, description, and action link sections. Features a clean, minimal design with card-based layout suitable for displaying metrics, statistics, and KPIs on dashboards. Uses shadcn/ui-style design tokens and Tailwind CSS for styling.
